message.content:
@startuml
title Sequence diagram for the whole CCX (external) data pipeline
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
skinparam participantStyle rectangle
skinparam noteStyle rectangle
skinparam actorStyle awesome
skinparam databaseStyle cylinder
skinparam cloudStyle cloud
skinparam rectangleStyle rectangle
skinparam componentStyle rectangle
skinparam interfaceStyle rectangle
skinparam queueStyle rectangle
skinparam entityStyle rectangle
skinparam boundaryStyle rectangle
skinparam controlStyle rectangle
skinparam participantPadding 20
skinparam boxPadding 10
skinparam backgroundColor #FFFFFF
skinparam sequence {
  LifeLineBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  LifeLineBorderColor #000000
  ArrowColor #000000
  ArrowThickness 1
  MessageAlignment center
  NoteBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  NoteBorderColor #000000
  NoteFontColor #000000
  NoteFontSize 12
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  ParticipantBorderColor #000000
  ParticipantFontColor #000000
  ParticipantFontSize 12
  ParticipantPadding 20
  BoxBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  BoxBorderColor #000000
  BoxFontColor #000000
  BoxFontSize 12
  BoxPadding 10
  DividerBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  DividerBorderColor #000000
  DividerFontColor #000000
  DividerFontSize 12
  DividerPadding 10
  GroupBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  GroupBorderColor #000000
  GroupFontColor #000000
  GroupFontSize 12
  GroupPadding 10
  LoopBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  LoopBorderColor #000000
  LoopFontColor #000000
  LoopFontSize 12
  LoopPadding 10
  OptBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  OptBorderColor #000000
  OptFontColor #000000
  OptFontSize 12
  OptPadding 10
  AltBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  AltBorderColor #000000
  AltFontColor #000000
  AltFontSize 12
  AltPadding 10
  ElseBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  ElseBorderColor #000000
  ElseFontColor #000000
  ElseFontSize 12
  ElsePadding 10
  ParBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  ParBorderColor #000000
  ParFontColor #000000
  ParFontSize 12
  ParPadding 10
  CriticalBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  CriticalBorderColor #000000
  CriticalFontColor #000000
  CriticalFontSize 12
  CriticalPadding 10
  BreakBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  BreakBorderColor #000000
  BreakFontColor #000000
  BreakFontSize 12
  BreakPadding 10
  RefBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  RefBorderColor #000000
  RefFontColor #000000
  RefFontSize 12
  RefPadding 10
  NoteBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  NoteBorderColor #000000
  NoteFontColor #000000
  NoteFontSize 12
  NotePadding 10
  LegendBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  LegendBorderColor #000000
  LegendFontColor #000000
  LegendFontSize 12
  LegendPadding 10
  HeaderBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  HeaderBorderColor #000000
  HeaderFontColor #000000
  HeaderFontSize 12
  HeaderPadding 10
  FooterBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  FooterBorderColor #000000
  FooterFontColor #000000
  FooterFontSize 12
  FooterPadding 10
}
skinparam defaultFontName "Arial"
skinparam defaultFontSize 12
skinparam defaultFontColor #000000
skinparam defaultBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
skinparam defaultBorderColor #000000
skinparam defaultPadding 10
skinparam defaultMargin 10
skinparam defaultSpacing 10
skinparam defaultAlignment center
skinparam defaultDirection horizontal
skinparam defaultOrientation horizontal
skinparam defaultLayout horizontal
skinparam defaultPosition center
skinparam defaultSize auto
skinparam defaultShape rectangle
skinparam defaultStyle solid
skinparam defaultThickness 1
skinparam defaultOpacity 100
skinparam defaultShadow false
skinparam defaultGradient false
skinparam defaultPattern none
skinparam defaultTexture none
skinparam defaultImage none
skinparam defaultIcon none
skinparam defaultSymbol none
skinparam defaultText none
skinparam defaultLabel none
skinparam defaultTitle none
skinparam defaultCaption none
skinparam defaultDescription none
skinparam defaultComment none
skinparam defaultNote none
skinparam defaultLegend none
skinparam defaultHeader none
skinparam defaultFooter none
skinparam defaultWatermark none
skinparam defaultBackground none
skinparam defaultBorder none
skinparam defaultFill none
skinparam defaultStroke none
skinparam defaultLine none
skinparam defaultArrow none
skinparam defaultConnector none
skinparam defaultLink none
skinparam defaultRelation none
skinparam defaultAssociation none
skinparam defaultDependency none
skinparam defaultAggregation none
skinparam defaultComposition none
skinparam defaultGeneralization none
skinparam defaultRealization none
skinparam defaultImplementation none
skinparam defaultInterface none
skinparam defaultComponent none
skinparam defaultNode none
skinparam defaultDevice none
skinparam defaultArtifact none
skinparam defaultPackage none
skinparam defaultSubsystem none
skinparam defaultModel none
skinparam defaultView none
skinparam defaultDiagram none
skinparam defaultFrame none
skinparam defaultGroup none
skinparam defaultPartition none
skinparam defaultRegion none
skinparam defaultZone none
skinparam defaultArea none
skinparam defaultSpace none
skinparam defaultContainer none
skinparam defaultElement none
skinparam defaultObject none
skinparam defaultClass none
skinparam defaultInterface none
skinparam defaultComponent none
skinparam defaultNode none
skinparam defaultDevice none
skinparam defaultArtifact none
skinparam defaultPackage none
skinparam defaultSubsystem none
skinparam defaultModel none
skinparam defaultView none
skinparam defaultDiagram none
skinparam defaultFrame none
skinparam defaultGroup none
skinparam defaultPartition none
skinparam defaultRegion none
skinparam defaultZone none
skinparam defaultArea none
skinparam defaultSpace none
skinparam defaultContainer none
skinparam defaultElement none
skinparam defaultObject none
skinparam defaultClass none

participant "Smart Proxy" as SP #9999FF
participant "3Scale" as 3S #CCCCCC
box "Insights operator" #CCFFCC
  participant "Control logic" as CL #CCCCCC
  participant "IO memory cache" as IO #CCCCCC
end box
participant "CRD" as CRD #CCCCCC
participant "OCP WebConsole" as OCP #CCCCCC

== Pulling data from Smart Proxy ==
CL -> 3S: Get recommendations\norg ID\ncluster ID
3S -> SP: Get recommendations\norg ID\ncluster ID
SP --> 3S: Recommendations for cluster
3S --> CL: Recommendations for cluster

== Exposing recommendations ==
CL -> IO: Store recommendations
IO -> CRD: Expose recommendations

== Pulling from OCP WebConsole ==
OCP -> CRD: Read recommendations
CRD --> OCP: Here are required data

footer Copyright © 2020 Red Hat, Inc. Author: Pavel Tisnovsky
@enduml
